contract.promotion: Generate candidates with tools/lupi_comfy_panorama.py --manifest tools/lupi-comfy-world-prompts.json --sota-seam-profile, then promote explicitly with --promote-run.
notes: This manifest is the high-end Comfy candidate pack for 360 World backgrounds.
Keep the center readable for molecule geometry; put dense texture and storytelling detail near peripheral longitudes.
Use --sota-seam-profile by default so runs include circular/yaw/cubemap prompt language, production defaults, wider repair, and QA gating.
Promoted files intentionally share the same names as the procedural world pack so the UI can upgrade assets without runtime rewiring.

global_positive: premium scientific visualization environment, true 2:1 cylindrical equirectangular panorama, seamless horizontal wrap, circular latent continuity, yaw-invariant composition, cubemap-safe zenith and nadir, smooth pole caps, no discontinuity at any longitude cut, coherent lighting around the full 360 degrees, quiet readable central region for a molecular viewer, high-end SIGGRAPH-quality material science background, rich edge detail, crisp but elegant, physically plausible volumetric light, full-bleed rectangular panorama
global_negative: text, letters, watermark, logo, signature, people, face, body, animal, foreground object, centered planet, moon, orb, sphere, ring, bullseye, black hole, fisheye circle, circular mask, oval mask, square crop, portrait crop, frame, border, white margin, page, visible seam, hard left edge, hard right edge, unmatched left and right edges, discontinuous panorama, mirrored quadrant, repeated tile, cube face edge artifact, polar swirl, polar spike, polar pinch, stretched pole texture, overexposed center, noisy center, blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
